query: What is the default chunk size used during document ingestion?
expected_answer: The default chunk size is 512 tokens with a 50-token overlap.

query: Which embedding model is used for generating document embeddings?
expected_answer: sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2

query: What LLM is used for query-time reasoning?
expected_answer: Groq-hosted LLaMA-3.3-70B-Versatile is used for query-time reasoning.

query: What graph database is used to store entity relationships?
expected_answer: Neo4j is used to store entities and relationships.

query: What vector database is used for semantic similarity search?
expected_answer: FAISS (Facebook AI Similarity Search) is used for vector embeddings.

query: Which team owns the system that caused last quarter's major incident?
expected_answer: Requires tracing: Incident -> caused_by -> System -> owns -> Team.

query: What policies are violated by the systems that the infrastructure team depends on?
expected_answer: Requires: Team -> part_of -> System ->depends_on -> System -> violates -> Policy.

query: Who approved the procurement policy that was violated in the Q3 budget incident?
expected_answer: Requires: Incident -> violates -> Policy -> owns -> Person.

query: Which code modules implement the policies owned by the security team?
expected_answer: Requires: Team -> owns -> Policy <- implements <- CodeModule.

query: Which persons report to the manager responsible for the payment service outage?
expected_answer: Requires: Incident -> caused_by -> System -> owns -> Person <- reports_to <- Person.

query: What systems are affected by incidents that violate data retention policies?
expected_answer: Requires: Policy <- violates <- Incident -> caused_by -> System.

query: Which documents mention all systems that depend on the authentication service?
expected_answer: Requires: System -> depends_on -> System <- mentions <- Document.

query: Which team members are associated with the service that had a SLA breach last month?
expected_answer: Requires: Incident -> caused_by -> System -> owns -> Team -> part_of -> Person.

query: Trace the full responsibility chain for the database outage incident from last year.
expected_answer: Full chain: Incident -> caused_by -> System -> depends_on -> System -> owns -> Person -> reports_to -> Person.

query: Which executives ultimately own the systems involved in compliance violations this year?
expected_answer: Requires 4+ hops through Incident -> Policy -> System -> Person -> reports_to -> Person chain.

query: What are all the downstream systems affected when the authentication service fails?
expected_answer: Requires recursive depends_on traversal starting from authentication service.

query: Find all code modules that transitively implement security policies through their dependent services.
expected_answer: Requires: CodeModule -> implements -> Policy; Service -> depends_on -> Service -> violates -> Policy.

query: Which employees are most connected to incidents involving GDPR policy violations?
expected_answer: Requires traversal through Incident-Policy-System-Team-Person nodes.

query: Map the complete dependency chain from the frontend service to its database systems.
expected_answer: Chain of depends_on relationships from frontend service through middleware to databases.

query: Which documents capture all incidents connected to systems owned by the platform team?
expected_answer: Team -> owns -> System <- caused_by <- Incident <- mentions <- Document.

query: What is the data retention policy for customer records?
expected_answer: Customer records must be retained for 7 years per company data governance policy.

query: What is the incident response procedure for a P1 outage?
expected_answer: P1 incidents require immediate escalation within 15 minutes and executive notification within 1 hour.

query: Is it policy violation to share internal API keys externally?
expected_answer: Yes, sharing internal API keys externally violates the secrets management policy.

query: What approval is required before deploying to production?
expected_answer: Production deployments require sign-off from both the team lead and a security reviewer.

query: Which teams are required to undergo annual security training?
expected_answer: All engineering, operations, and data teams must complete annual security awareness training.

query: Compare the response time of the legacy authentication service vs the new SSO system.
expected_answer: Legacy auth averages 250ms; new SSO system averages 45ms — a 5x improvement.

query: Which incident management approach — automated vs manual — has a lower MTTR?
expected_answer: Automated incident management achieves MTTR of 22 minutes vs 4.5 hours for manual processes.

query: How does the FAISS vector store performance compare to keyword search for enterprise queries?
expected_answer: FAISS achieves 85% precision@10 vs 61% for keyword search on enterprise document sets.

query: What does the entity_extractor module return and what is its input format?
expected_answer: entity_extractor.extract_from_chunks() accepts a list of DocumentChunk objects and returns a list of ExtractedEntity dataclasses.

query: How does the HybridRetriever merge vector and graph results?
expected_answer: HybridRetriever.merge() deduplicates by chunk_id, normalizes scores to 0-1, applies weighted fusion (60% vector, 40% graph), and returns ranked HybridResult list.
